response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a Staff/Senior-level engineer with 15+ years of experience across fullstack, embedded, mobile, and AI-agent infrastructure — fundamentally overqualified for a junior/mid-level entry role. The technical stack partially aligns (TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST APIs, Kubernetes), and the nice-to-have LLM/AI integration experience is a genuine asset, but placing a candidate of this caliber in an entry-level IC position creates near-certain attrition risk and likely incompatible compensation expectations. PostgreSQL is absent from the resume, and Nest.js is not mentioned, further weakening fit on stated required skills.
strengths: Validated TypeScript and Node.js proficiency across multiple production environments including high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby and pricing pipelines at Optilyz
Hands-on LLM/AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq directly matches the nice-to-have AI integration requirement
Kubernetes production deployment experience via GISCollective plus AWS CDK usage at Optilyz covers most of the cloud nice-to-haves
concerns: Severe overqualification: 15+ years at Staff/Senior level applying for an entry-level role creates high attrition risk and almost certain compensation band mismatch
No explicit PostgreSQL experience; databases listed are MongoDB and MySQL, which is a gap against the stated relational DB preference
Nest.js is entirely absent and React usage is mentioned only briefly in one role, suggesting a backend-leaning profile that may underfit the fullstack and frontend emphasis of the position

key_factors.factor: TypeScript, Node.js, and REST API depth
